About Me

Highly skilled WordPress Developer and Full-Stack Engineer with 5 years of experience. Expertise in custom WordPress development, REST API integration, performance optimization, and complex MySQL queries.

Proficient in Next.js, React, Node.js, and MongoDB, delivering scalable, user-focused solutions by combining modern JS frameworks with robust backend architectures.
